description: Machine-readable pin of every vendored dependency under third_party/. scripts/license_scan.py enforces 1:1 correspondence in CI (spec section 15, constraint 1). Allowed licenses: MIT/BSD/Apache/zlib preferred; LGPL only if dynamically linked; no proprietary SDKs.

dependencies.name: xxhash
dependencies.role: content hashing (interned Name ids; journal/golden hashes later)

dependencies.name: fast_float
dependencies.role: correctly-rounded locale-free double parsing (core JSON; old libc++ has no FP from_chars)

dependencies.name: dragonbox
dependencies.role: shortest round-trip double digits (core JSON emission, byte-identical on every platform)

dependencies.name: quickjs-ng
dependencies.role: embedded JS engine for the TypeScript script tier (spec section 7; JIT-less by design for iOS; core library only — quickjs-libc is deliberately NOT vendored, so scripts have no OS/filesystem/timer surface)

dependencies.name: typescript
dependencies.role: TypeScript compiler vendored AS DATA (typescript.js runs on the embedded QuickJS — no Node anywhere, Aurora D-11) + the lib.es2020 d.ts closure it typechecks against; never compiled or linked

dependencies.name: JoltPhysics
dependencies.role: THE physics engine (spec section 6); minimal deterministic server in M0 (core/physics). Vendored subset: the Jolt/ library tree only, byte-pristine — no samples/tests/viewer; ObjectStream/ is on disk but not compiled (ENABLE_OBJECT_STREAM=OFF shape). Built with JPH_CROSS_PLATFORM_DETERMINISTIC under the repo FP contract (D-BUILD-073)

dependencies.name: rapidyaml
dependencies.role: strict-YAML parsing for the PERMANENT loader subset (core/loader, m0-yaml-loader-run). Vendored as the upstream amalgamated single header (release asset rapidyaml-0.15.2.hpp, byte-pristine) plus ryml.cpp, the one TU defining RYML_SINGLE_HDR_DEFINE_NOW per upstream convention. Chosen over yaml-cpp (exception-driven API, weak location reporting) and libfyaml (C, heavier surface) for structured parse-error locations, callback-based error handling, and MIT (D-BUILD-076)

dependencies.name: zstd
dependencies.role: journal stream compression (run.mrj journal.jsonl.zst; single-file amalgamation from upstream build/single_file_libs, regenerated with ZSTD_MULTITHREAD removed for deterministic single-threaded output, D-BUILD-031)
